hooks.command: mkdir -p "$HOME/.codex/agents" && for f in "$PLUGIN_ROOT/agents"/*.toml; do [ -f "$f" ] && ln -sf "$f" "$HOME/.codex/agents/$(basename "$f")"; done
hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import os,shutil,glob; d=os.path.join(os.environ['PLUGIN_ROOT'],'agents'); t=os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'),'.codex','agents'); os.makedirs(t,exist_ok=True); [shutil.copy2(f,os.path.join(t,os.path.basename(f))) for f in glob.glob(os.path.join(d,'*.toml'))]"
